case_title: FERGUSON, ANDREA vs. CAR-LENE RESEARCH, INC. OF CALIFORNIA A CORP.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FERGUSON, ANDREA AS TO DEFENDANT CAR-LENE RESEARCH, INC. OF CALIFORNIA A CORP.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FERGUSON, ANDREA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAR-LENE RESEARCH, INC. OF CALIFORNIA A CORP. $1,125.88 PRINCIPAL, $89.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,214.88
